summary: Massive v1.3.0 session: SVG pips, mechanical enforcement gates (modulesRead, per-turn verify, action card stat/DC checks, hand-written widget detection), POI budget system, level-up panel with glowing footer button, dice widget preamble/aliases, UI/UX fixes (toast leak, dialogue fallback, ship badge contrast, fieldset/legend, footer dimming), verify for non-scene widget types, character creation payload fix, verify stderr reminder, 8-agent pre-shipping review with all findings fixed including VALID_TOP_KEYS data loss bug, station.css duplicate cleanup. Tests 1087→1144.

tasks.content: SVG pips (renderHpPips/renderXpTrack) replacing plain text HP/XP in scene+character
_modulesRead render gate — scene blocked without Tier 1 modules loaded
Per-turn verify gate — scene:turnCount in .needs-verify blocks same-scene re-renders without verify
Action card stat name + DC value verify checks (Golden Rules 3+4)
Hand-written widget detection (checkTagRenderOrigin, checkPanelNesting)
Verify handles non-scene widget types (dice, dialogue, levelup, etc.)
Dice widget: context preamble, modifier breakdown, stat/attribute/checkLabel/modifierLabel aliases
POI point budget — client-side click tracking with auto-dim on data-poi buttons
Level-up panel — _levelupPending flag, glowing footer button, stat choice cards, confirm sendPrompt
UI/UX fixes: toast DOM leak, dialogue sendPrompt fallback, ship badge contrast, fieldset/legend, footer dimming
Character creation sendPrompt includes stats/HP/AC/abilities
Verify success message forbids post-verify modification and save embedding
tag render scene prints verify reminder to stderr
8-agent pre-shipping review — all blockers fixed (VALID_TOP_KEYS, batch handler, dnd_5e, station.css)
Station.css: removed 162 lines duplicate :host blocks + stale panel override
Split render.spec.ts (968 lines) before it hits 1000-line edit block
CDN_BASE hardcodes @feature/tag-cli-v1.3.0 — update to @main at merge time
tag.ts checkCompactionPreflight reads state bypassing path validation — route through tryLoadState()
Write negative tests for 4 new verify checks (checkTagRenderOrigin, checkPanelNesting, checkStatusBar, checkSendPromptFallback)
Audio module: implement 4 missing soundscapes (heartbeat, station-ambience, underwater, fire)
POI proficiency gating — deferred from simplified POI budget

next_steps: Split render.spec.ts — 968 lines, 32 from hard limit. Extract by feature area into separate spec files.
Update CDN_BASE from @feature/tag-cli-v1.3.0 to @main before merge.
Push branch to origin so CDN picks up changes for playtest validation.
Write negative tests for the 4 new verify check functions added this session.
Fix tag.ts checkCompactionPreflight to route through tryLoadState() instead of raw readFileSync.

context.test_results: 1,144 tests passing across 65 files. Zero failures.
context.architecture_notes: Per-turn verify gate uses scene:turnCount in .needs-verify — verify increments _turnCount, next render blocks on mismatch. Level-up uses _levelupPending flag set by sync, rendered as panel overlay in scene widget. POI budget is client-side only via data-poi-budget attribute on .root div. Enforcement audit: 30% gated, 70% advisory. Audio improvements deferred (decision in memory).
context.known_limitations: render.spec.ts at 968 lines — cannot add tests without splitting. verify.ts at 601 lines. CDN_BASE hardcodes feature branch — must update at merge. 4 new verify checks lack negative tests. TIER1_MODULES duplicated in settings.ts line 52 (should import from constants.ts). SCI_FI_THEMES dedup done (exported from names.ts).
context.review_status: 8-agent pre-shipping review completed. All Critical and High findings fixed. Remaining Medium/Low items documented in review findings. Security: CLEAR. Performance: CLEAN.
context.playtest_observations: GM still hand-writes widgets despite checkTagRenderOrigin gate. GM invents field names for dice --data (stat/attribute/checkLabel). GM skips verify despite stderr warning. GM embeds save data after verify passes. Per-turn verify gate should prevent most of these in future sessions.
